title: Grant Osborne
text: Home * People * Grant Osborne Grant Osborne , a British computer chess programmer, and author of the chess program AtlanChess . Grant Osborne was involved in finding dense Magics for Magic Bitboards [1] , and proposed Magic Compression for Kindergarten Bitboards [2] . Forum Posts [ edit ] A Faster Magic Move Bitboard Generator? by Grant Osborne , Winboard Forum , December 15, 2006 Incorporating the shift into the magic number by Grant Osborne , CCC , June 18, 2008 Bitboard of Pinned Pieces by Grant Osborne , CCC , July 24, 2008 References [ edit ] ↑ A Faster Magic Move Bitboard Generator? by Grant Osborne , Winboard Forum , December 15, 2006 ↑ Re: How to reduce the "bits" used in a magic number by Grant Osborne , CCC , July 04, 2008 Up one level
